title: carex breviculmis subsp. fibrillosa
intro: Carex breviculmis subsp. fibrillosa, also known as the short-spike sedge, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Carex breviculmis subsp. fibrillosa include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce swelling, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
